place: Layi-Nakalay Road, Kamala, Kathu District, Phuket, Thailand
title: Thai-Style Seven-Bedroom Villa with Sunset Sea Views — Kamala
blurb: A seven-bedroom villa on Kamala's Millionaire's Mile, its Thai-style pavilions and 12.7-metre pool opening to the Andaman Sea and long west-coast sunsets. Sala, pool bar, billiards, gym and a steam room sit across some 2,200 m² of living space, with a six-strong team and a private chef, sleeping up to sixteen.
detail:
Strung along Kamala's celebrated Millionaire's Mile, this seven-bedroom villa is built in the Thai idiom — timber, pitched roofs and open pavilions — and steps down its slope toward the Andaman Sea. Seaside platforms and terraces catch the breeze and the sunset, and the whole house is oriented to the water.

Across roughly 2,200 m² of living space, four master bedrooms, two guest rooms and a duplex room sleep up to sixteen; six of the bedrooms have their own outdoor bathtub. A 12.7-metre swimming pool anchors the main terrace, with a pool bar alongside and both indoor and outdoor dining.

The house is laid out for a large group at leisure — a Thai sala and garden gazebo, a billiards table, fitness equipment, a steam room, a garden play area and a BBQ, with nine smart televisions and high-speed internet throughout. The gardens run down toward the seaside platforms and the water beyond.

A team of six, including a private chef, looks after the day-to-day, with daily housekeeping, turndown and airport transfers included; food, car and driver, spa treatments, laundry and a wine list are arranged on request. Kamala's beach and restaurants are minutes away.

features.l: 12.7 m swimming pool with pool bar
Thai-style pavilions with sunset sea views
Six staff & private chef · ≈2,200 m² living
